How it works Pricing Verify
Blockchain-verified · eIDAS signed · EU valid

The verified passport
your development deserves

One certified document. Every buyer convinced.

Your development, verified
Sell with credibility — any buyer can independently verify your project is real, legal and on track
Close faster — verified trust removes the hesitation that delays reservations and slows decisions
Stand out in any listing with a verified badge no competitor can replicate
One document that stays current — updated at each construction milestone automatically
The problem we fix
Buyers can't verify who you are or whether your documents are real — so they delay or walk away
No credible standard exists to certify a development before it's built
One bad actor damages the whole market — including developers with nothing to hide
See a live example
How it works

Live in 48 hours

1
Submit your development
Complete your profile and upload documents. Your legal rep signs digitally — no account needed.
2
We verify and certify
Verified against the Mercantile Register and BORME. Hash recorded immutably on Polygon.
3
Publish and share
Bilingual PDF ready. Widget live on your site. Passport link for any listing portal.
Why Devimia

Trust that sells

Trusted by any buyer
Independent verification. No intermediaries.
Blockchain-backed integrity
Hashed on Polygon. Impossible to alter after issuance.
eIDAS-qualified signature
Qualified digital certificate, valid across the EU.
Updates as you build
Updated at each stage. Your widget always reflects reality.
Transparent for every buyer
Verified documentation builds trust with every buyer.
Optional notarial act
Digital notarial act — valid across the EU. No Apostille needed.

Project conception
Land acquired, project defined, team assembled. No permits yet.
Done

Done

Current
04

Developer finance confirmed. Buyer deposit accounts open.

Site works underway. Foundation and structure phase begun.
06

07

08

09

Licencia de primera ocupación obtained. Units ready for handover.
10
Delivered
All units handed over to buyers. Development complete.
Stages before the current one are locked. Contact support to correct a stage.
